name: ethernetPacket Selectors: <protocol>.byte/word/dword/qword/char/int/long/int64
title: ethernetPacket Selectors: <protocol>.byte/word/dword/qword/char/int/long/int64
description: Access to the payload of a protocol.

If index is greater than available data or <protocol> is not contained in the packet, the measurement is stopped with a runtime error. ethernetPacket::protocol::IsAvailable and ethernetPacket::protocol::byteLength can be used to find out if the data is available.

parameters.name: Index
parameters.description: Byte offset. Index 0 is the first byte within the payload of the protocol. If index is greater than ethernetPacket.<protocol>.byteLength a runtime error occurs.
